subject: Maintenance costs at multi-site FM operations — a pattern we keep seeing
body:
Hi Mohammed,

Running facilities management across multiple sites in Riyadh, your operations team is likely spending a significant portion of reactive maintenance budget on unplanned callouts — typically running 2-3x higher than planned maintenance costs for FM companies at your scale.

The structural issue is usually the same: work orders are tracked across disconnected systems, so the data exists but the pattern is invisible until a site escalates.

Dealix has helped FM operations teams surface this pattern from their existing data and shift the maintenance ratio — without replacing existing systems.

Would a 30-minute operations review be useful? I can show you what the analysis typically reveals for companies of your size.

Best regards,
[Name]
Dealix
